Title: Exact Product Name Search
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter exact product name 3. Click search or press Enter
Expected Result: Product appears in search results with correct name and price

Title: Partial Product Name Search
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter partial product name 3. Click search
Expected Result: Multiple products containing "Nike" are displayed in results

Title: Brand Search
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter brand name 3. Click search
Expected Result: All products from Nike brand are displayed

Title: Category Search
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter category name 3. Click search
Expected Result: Products from shoes category are displayed

Title: SKU Search
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter product SKU 3. Click search
Expected Result: Specific product with matching SKU is displayed

Title: Case Insensitive Search - Lowercase
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter search term in lowercase 3. Click search
Expected Result: Products containing "Nike" are displayed regardless of case

Title: Case Insensitive Search - Uppercase
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter search term in uppercase 3. Click search
Expected Result: Products containing "nike" are displayed regardless of case

Title: Case Insensitive Search - Mixed Case
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter search term in mixed case 3. Click search
Expected Result: Products are displayed with correct results

Title: Search with Leading Spaces
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter search with leading spaces 3. Click search
Expected Result: Search processes correctly and finds Nike products (spaces trimmed)

Title: Search with Trailing Spaces
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter search with trailing spaces 3. Click search
Expected Result: Search processes correctly and finds Nike products (spaces trimmed)

Title: Search with Multiple Spaces Between Words
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter search with multiple spaces 3. Click search
Expected Result: Search normalizes spaces and finds relevant products

Title: Single Character Search
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter single character 3. Click search
Expected Result: System displays products containing the character or shows appropriate message

Title: Two Character Search
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter two characters 3. Click search
Expected Result: System displays products containing the characters

Title: Maximum Character Search
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter 100+ characters 3. Click search
Test Data: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipiscing elit sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua
Expected Result: System handles gracefully without crashing

Title: Empty Search Query
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Leave empty 3. Click search
Expected Result: System displays message or all products or recent products

Title: Search with Numbers Only
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter numbers only 3. Click search
Expected Result: System searches and displays results or shows no results message

Title: Search with Special Characters
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter special characters 3. Click search
Expected Result: System handles gracefully without crashing

Title: Search with Hyphen
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter term with hyphen 3. Click search
Expected Result: Products are found or appropriate message displayed

Title: Search with Apostrophe
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter term with apostrophe 3. Click search
Expected Result: System handles apostrophe correctly

Title: Search with Quotes
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter term with quotes 3. Click search
Expected Result: System handles quotes without breaking or showing errors

Title: Search with SQL Injection Attempt
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter SQL injection string 3. Click search
Expected Result: System displays no results or appropriate error message without executing SQL

Title: Search with XSS Payload (Script Tag)
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter XSS script tag 3. Click search
Expected Result: Script does not execute; system displays safe error message

Title: Search with HTML Tags
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter HTML tags 3. Click search
Expected Result: HTML tags are not rendered; system treats as plain text

Title: Random Invalid Text
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter random gibberish 3. Click search
Expected Result: System displays "No results found" or similar message

Title: Non-existent Product Search
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Enter name of non-existent product 3. Click search
Expected Result: System displays "No results found" message

Title: Search Result Count
Precondition: User is on Evershop homepage and search returns results
Test Steps: 1. Perform search with popular term 2. Note result count 3. Verify pagination
Expected Result: Result count is displayed; pagination controls appear if results > limit

Title: Search Result Ordering - Relevance
Test Steps: 1. View search results 2. Verify top results match search term most closely
Expected Result: Most relevant products appear at top of results

Title: Search Result Accuracy
Test Steps: 1. Click on first result 2. Verify product contains search term in name or description
Expected Result: Product details contain the search keyword

Title: Search Response Time
Test Steps: 1. Record time before search 2. Enter search query 3. Record time results appear
Expected Result: Results appear within 3 seconds

Title: Search Auto-suggest Feature
Precondition: User is typing in search box
Test Steps: 1. Click search box 2. Start typing 3. Observe suggestions
Expected Result: Search suggestions appear as user types (if feature exists)

Title: Search History
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. Observe dropdown
Expected Result: Previous search queries are displayed (if feature exists)

Title: Clear Search Box
Test Steps: 1. Click on search box 2. View clear/X button 3. Click to clear
Expected Result: Search box is cleared; previous results cleared

Title: Search Box Placeholder Text
Test Steps: 1. Observe search box when empty
Expected Result: Placeholder text such as "Search products" is visible

Expected Result: All search features work correctly on desktop Chrome

Test Steps: 1. Perform search functionality flow

Expected Result: Results are filtered by selected price range

Title: Filter Search Results by Brand
Test Steps: 1. Apply brand filter from sidebar/filter section
Expected Result: Results are filtered to show only selected brand

Title: Filter Search Results by Size
Test Steps: 1. Apply size filter from sidebar/filter section
Expected Result: Results are filtered to show only selected size

Title: Filter Search Results by Color

Title: Search and Sort Results - Price Low to High
Test Steps: 1. Click Sort dropdown 2. Select Price: Low to High
Expected Result: Results are sorted by price in ascending order

Title: Search and Sort Results - Price High to Low
